title: Review: second full-project pass
notes: Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — one more 429 mapping bug (azure-kv, same pattern as doppler/vault). Keyring blocking-in-async is a latency risk for macOS/Linux deployments. No new correctness bugs beyond these.
design: Confidence: HIGH on 429 bug (code is unambiguous, TooManyRequests constant confirmed in azure_core 0.35.0 source). HIGH on keyring blocking (FileBackend uses spawn_blocking; keyring does not). Nothing missed in: pkcs11, local-signing, aws-ssm, cache, file, gcp-sm, vault (post-fix), doppler (post-fix). No issues in env, core JSON scanner (reviewed in first pass). Note: azure-kv not integration-tested so is_transient path cannot be verified against a live service.
